# Ascent Mission Assurance LLC
Mission Assurance and Quality Oversight Specialist for High-Reliability Industries.

## Core Expertise
- Standards: IA9100, J-STD-001 Space Addendum, NASA-STD-8739.4, FAA IA.
- Compliance: IPC-A-610 Class 3, IPC-WHMA-A-620, AS6174 Counterfeit Mitigation.
- Markets: Aviation, Defense Prime Contractors, Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS), and SME Aerospace Suppliers.

## Deployment Model
- Fully Mobile Authority: Providing on-site oversight and remote program management globally. 
- Strategic Hubs Served: Merritt Island, Houston, Los Angeles, Seattle, and Global Defense Centers.
